title: 🔮 AI Workflow Architect - 6 Sacred Languages Protocol
content:

Slack notification to team GitHub Actions Setup: - Run automated tests (unit, integration, e2e) - Code quality checks (linting, security scans) - Generate test coverage reports - Update Notion with test results Phase 2: Build & Package Zap 2: Test Pass → Build Trigger • Trigger: GitHub Actions test success • Action 1: Initiate multi-platform builds iOS: Xcode build → .ipa package Android: Gradle build → .apk/.aab package Desktop: Electron build → .exe/.dmg/.deb • Action 2: Code signing & certificate management • Action 3: Generate build artifacts • Action 4: Upload to cloud storage (S3/GCS) • Action 5: Update Notion build tracker Phase 3: Quality Assurance Zap 3: Build Complete → QA Pipeline • Trigger: Build artifacts uploaded • Action 1: Deploy to staging environment • Action 2: Run 4: Update website download links • Action 5: Create Notion deployment record • Action 6: Send launch notification email Phase 6: Post-Launch Monitoring Zap 6: Store Live → Monitoring Setup • Trigger: Create daily status report in Notion • Action 6: Alert on critical issues Supporting Zaps Zap 7: Version Control Management • Trigger: Release tag created • Actions: Update changelogs, create GitHub release, notify stakeholders Zap 8: Rollback Automation • Trigger: Critical bug detected • Actions: Revert to previous version, notify team, create incident report Zap 9: User Feedback Loop • Trigger:
